title: PhEye PII Lens
description: Frontmatter metadata for a PII lens — the structured fields the website and PhEye consume from each lens's sidecar .md file.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier — must match the filename and the URL on philterd.ai/lenses/<slug>/.

license.description: License identifier for this lens (e.g. 'Apache-2', 'MIT', 'Proprietary'). Each lens declares its own license — there is no repo-wide LICENSE file.

status.description: Shipping state. 'available' = released and supported; 'preview' = working but unstable API; 'coming-soon' = metadata published, model not yet shipped; 'deprecated' = replaced by another lens.

entities.description: Entity types the lens detects. Use PhEye's standard vocabulary (PERSON, LOCATION, ORG, HOSPITAL, MEDICATION, etc.) where possible.

languages.description: ISO 639-1 language codes (with optional region) the lens is trained for.

summary.description: One- or two-sentence summary for the catalog card.

useCase.description: Paragraph-length guidance on when to load this lens.

creator.description: Slugified author handle. Use 'philterd' for core team lenses.

updated.description: YYYY-MM-DD of the last meaningful update.

pheyeCompatibility.description: Semver range — which PhEye versions can load this lens.

pairsWith.description: Optional, slugs of other lenses commonly loaded alongside this one.
